hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .stop_hook_active)" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; CLAUDE_VER=$(grep -oP "Current Version: v\K[0-9.]+" CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null) && TS_VER=$(grep -oP "APP_VERSION.*\"\K[0-9.]+" src/config/version.ts 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$CLAUDE_VER" ] && [ -n "$TS_VER" ] && [ "$CLAUDE_VER" != "$TS_VER" ]; then echo "VERSION MISMATCH: CLAUDE.md ($CLAUDE_VER) != version.ts ($TS_VER)" >&2; exit 2; fi'
